title: Mara’s Pond of Dreams
cover_prompt: A soft watercolor of a round, gentle frog named Mara with half-closed eyes, sitting on a lily pad at dusk. Fireflies glow warmly over a quiet pond, where fish ripple the water and tiny bugs rest on leaves. The sky is painted in muted blues and purples, with a silver moon casting a gentle shimmer.
lyrics:
[verse]
One frog on a lily, drifting slow
Moonlight hums soft, just below

[verse]
One frog on a lily, drifting slow
Two fish in the ripple, letting go

[verse]
One frog on a lily, drifting slow
Two fish in the ripple, letting go
Three bugs on a leaf, dreaming low

[verse]
One frog on a lily, drifting slow
Two fish in the ripple, letting go
Three bugs on a leaf, dreaming low
Four ducks in a row, floating slow
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, xylophone accompaniment

character.name: Mara
character.identity: A kind little frog who watches over the pond as its friends drift to sleep.
character.special: She hums the same soft tune every night to help the pond feel safe and still.

about: A soothing cumulative lullaby where Mara counts her pond friends as they fall asleep one by one. The gentle repetition and predictable rhythm help little minds unwind, turning bedtime into a quiet, dreamy ritual. Perfect for calming busy thoughts and easing into sleep.
